name: Health Potion

effects_structured.raw: Consume to restore 120 health over 15 seconds.

simpleDescription: Consume to restore Health over time

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Health Potion is modeled as manual sustain: activation consumes the item and applies healing over time (not instant burst).
In-game behavior note: activation is treated as unavailable at full health under normal use.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League of Legends Wiki - Health Potion
sources.used_for: page-level verification of consume activation behavior and heal-over-time amount/timing
